_readme: Master network interlink config. Lives in astro-gateway-master. Copied to every site clone. Never add footer links - all links must be contextual in-body only. READ THIS FILE BEFORE WRITING ANY CONTENT.

authority._readme: Approved authority language for VRA and Russell Bewsell. Use these snippets verbatim or adapt minimally. Never invent claims not listed here. This is the single source of truth for credentials across all sites.

company.name: Voice Recognition Australia
company.foundingClaim: Authorised Dragon reseller since Dragon first launched in Australia
approvedClaims: Australia's most experienced Nuance Platinum reseller for Dragon software
Authorised Dragon reseller since Dragon first launched in Australia
25 years of Dragon deployment across healthcare, legal, government and enterprise in Australia
One of only a small number of Nuance Platinum-tier authorised resellers in Australia

sectorClaims.healthcare: deployed Dragon Medical One and Dragon medical solutions across Australian medical practices and healthcare teams
sectorClaims.legal: deployed Dragon for legal dictation workflows across Australian law firms and legal practices
sectorClaims.government: deployed speech recognition solutions for Australian government agencies
sectorClaims.enterprise: deployed Dragon at scale across Australian enterprise environments

founder.name: Russell Bewsell
founder.title: Founder and CEO, Voice Recognition Australia
approvedClaims: Russell Bewsell, Founder and CEO of Voice Recognition Australia, has 28 years of experience in the speech recognition industry
One of Australia's leading authorities on Dragon deployment in healthcare and enterprise
Presented the Dragonology national training series on behalf of Nuance in 2017, speaking to thousands of Australian professionals across multiple cities about speech recognition

dragonology.description: National Dragon training series presented on behalf of Nuance
dragonology.reach: thousands of Australian professionals across multiple cities

youtubeChannel.name: Voice Recognition Australia - Speech to Text
approvedClaims: Voice Recognition Australia's YouTube training library has accumulated hundreds of thousands of views

featuredVideos.title: Dragon Professional - Dragon NaturallySpeaking Software
featuredVideos.url: [CONFIRM - owner to provide URL for 180K view video]
featuredVideos.note: Most-watched VRA video. URL to be confirmed by owner before referencing.

featuredVideos.title: Dragon Training Video - Dragonology Sydney
featuredVideos.note: Sydney session from the national Dragonology tour, presented on behalf of Nuance

hardRules: Only use claims explicitly listed in this authority block - never improvise credentials
Never invent statistics, client names, rankings, or award claims
Never claim clinical outcomes, patient safety improvements, or medical device status
Dragonology references must always include 'on behalf of Nuance' and '2017'
Never mention specific customer names, patient names, or organisation names unless explicitly approved
YouTube view counts must use the approximate figures listed here - do not invent or inflate numbers
'Platinum reseller' is the current approved tier - do not say Gold unless this block is updated

productivityNarrative.universalAngle: Every product in this network addresses a different bottleneck in the same problem: professionals and businesses spending too much time on documentation, administration, and manual processes instead of their actual work.
productivityNarrative.conclusionBridgeTemplate: Professionals who get the most value from {THIS_PRODUCT} often find that addressing {ADJACENT_PROBLEM} compounds the time saving significantly.

rules._note: No footer links. All links must be contextual - woven naturally into body copy or conclusion paragraphs.

internal.anchorVariation: required - never repeat same anchor text to same destination within same site

external.anchorVariation: required - track used anchors in link-usage.json, never repeat
